description: Model paraphrases instead of returning a verbatim quote. Quote validator MUST reject the candidate so it never reaches claims.
traps: exactQuote is a paraphrase of the source, not a verbatim substring. Tests that validateQuote catches paraphrase claims that look correct semantically.

messages.text: We need to switch the StarWars Empire mug program from Acme Factory to Tianhe by end of Q3 because Acme keeps missing their lead times.

claims.summary: StarWars Empire mug program will move from Acme Factory to Tianhe by end of Q3
claims.exactQuote: switch the StarWars Empire mug program from Acme Factory to Tianhe by end of Q3

forbiddenClaims.reason: Paraphrased quote — must not be promoted because exactQuote is not a verbatim substring of the source.
spans: We need to move the StarWars Empire mug from Acme to Tianhe
